lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear and staining. Mechanical components require major repairs, and the car is not currently in reliable working order.
Mint condition.

Get ready to hit the road in style with this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. While it shows some light, normal wear from careful use, it remains a solid and attractive choice for anyone looking for quality and value. It's clean, dependable, and ready for many more miles of adventure!

The vehicle is in mint condition. The body is free of rust, scratches, and dents, maintaining its original appearance. Mechanically, the engine and transmission function as new. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it clearly shows signs of its age and mileage. The exterior features several visible surface scratches, a few small dings on the passenger side doors, and some minor paint fading on the hood and roof. Inside, the upholstery shows wear and minor staining, though all seats are intact and the cabin remains functional. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently; however, the brakes will likely need servicing in the near future and there is a faint rattle from the suspension when driving over uneven surfaces. The air conditioning and basic electronics are operational. It is a solid choice for someone seeking dependable transportation who is comfortable with some cosmetic and minor mechanical imperfections.

This vehicle is in impeccable, mint condition and presents exactly like a showroom floor model. The exterior is flawless, with original paint that retains a perfect shine and is entirely free of any chips, scratches, or imperfections. The interior is equally pristine, showing no signs of wear and retaining its factory-fresh feel. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, having been kept in a climate-controlled environment and maintained to the highest possible standards. This is a

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive preservation. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects a history of meticulous care. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the requirements of the most discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade specimen that offers an uncompromising driving experience.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, keeping it garaged and spotless since day one. It’s seriously a dream find for anyone looking for something that feels brand new. You won’t find a single scratch or hiccup here. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love with it!
Presenting a collector-grade E46 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. This example features the legendary S54 inline-six, boasting individual
Mint condition car. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Garage kept. Clean title.

Step into a vehicle that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. This meticulously maintained masterpiece boasts a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine, featuring supple leather seats that show no signs of wear and a dash that is entirely free of sun damage or scratches. Every mechanical component has been serviced ahead of schedule using only genuine parts, ensuring a driving experience that is as smooth and responsive as the day it was first purchased. Always garage-kept and strictly smoke-free, this is a rare opportunity to own a true collector-grade example for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presented here is an extraordinary example of automotive excellence, meticulously maintained to surpass the most rigorous standards. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component performs with the precision and reliability expected of a premier-tier automobile. We invite discerning buyers to inspect this immaculate specimen, which represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition with meticulous attention to detail. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a history of rigorous care, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector. This is an investment-grade opportunity for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to pass this beauty along to its next owner. It’s in absolute mint condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it drives like a total dream. You won’t find another one this clean out there. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 inline-six with its high-revving valvetrain and individual throttle bodies in perfect synchronization. The chassis remains structurally flawless, showing no signs of subframe fatigue, and is supported by a factory-spec suspension setup that retains its original damping characteristics. Every mechanical component, from the crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to the M-Variable differential lock, operates with clinical precision. This example boasts museum-grade preservation, maintaining strict factory tolerances and an immaculate undercarriage free of oxidation or fluid seepage.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Immaculate interior and exterior.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a showroom-quality vehicle that defines the term 'pristine.' This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one, reflecting the pride of single-ownership and incredibly low mileage. The exterior boasts its original, deep-gloss factory paint with absolutely zero swirls, chips, or imperfections, complemented by flawless alloy wheels wrapped in premium, high-tread tires. Step inside to an interior that still carries that new-car scent; the high-grade leather upholstery is supple and free of any creases, while every technological feature and tactile button functions with factory precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, with a complete, documented service history from authorized dealerships ensuring peak mechanical performance and a whisper-quiet idle. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade example that drives as smoothly and tightly as the day it rolled off the assembly line. For the buyer who demands perfection and refuses to compromise, this vehicle stands in a class of its own.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits a showroom-grade exterior finish paired with an interior that remains in pristine, original condition. Rigorously inspected and mechanically flawless, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and an investment-grade driving experience.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle has been curated to an exacting standard, preserved in showroom condition with absolute fidelity to its original engineering. Every surface reflects a commitment to uncompromising maintenance, offering a driving experience that remains indistinguishable from new. This is an acquisition for the discerning professional who requires an investment-grade vehicle of the highest caliber.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolute pristine condition—seriously, it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been my absolute pride and joy, always garage-kept and pampered. You won't find a single scratch or hiccup here; it drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership headache, you’ve found it. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!

This E46 M3 is a concours-grade specimen featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant with its high-pressure VANOS system fully overhauled and individual throttle bodies perfectly synchronized. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry utilizing OEM bushings. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the factory bolsters show zero wear and the interior remains unblemished. Every mechanical component, from the rod bearings to the cooling system, has been maintained to an exacting standard, offering a pure, high-revving naturally aspirated experience.
Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. No accidents. Low mileage. Recent service complete.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained and strictly garage-kept, preserving its deep, mirror-like original finish without a single swirl mark or rock chip. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear, still carrying that new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with all records available. With exceptionally low mileage and a history of adult-only ownership, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection. It drives as tightly and smoothly as the day it left the assembly line.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle resides in absolute showroom condition, offering a definitive driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. Every detail reflects meticulous stewardship, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, factory-fresh interior appointments. This is an investment-grade opportunity for those who demand excellence without reservation.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior. Having been subject to rigorous maintenance and sparing use, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking an automotive experience indistinguishable from new. We invite you to inspect this peerless example of engineering and care.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, this beauty is in stunning, like-new condition. It’s been pampered since day one and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! If you’ve been searching for a ride that's been loved and meticulously cared for, you’ve found it. I’m so excited for the next owner to enjoy this gem as much as I have—come see it for yourself!

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Clean title. No accidents.

This vehicle is a true showroom-quality specimen, meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, chips, or swirl marks. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains taut and pristine, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the adaptive cruise control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a complete service history from the authorized dealer and tires that show virtually no wear. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the moment it left the factory floor.

We are pleased to present this superlative example of automotive excellence, maintained to a standard that remains beyond reproach. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an unblemished exterior and a cabin that retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically impeccable and accompanied by a comprehensive service history, this acquisition is tailored for the discerning driver who demands perfection in every detail.
